evidence.observation: Fixture parcel screening: Buncombe County parcel intersection — mountain/slope stress case (Black Mountain area). AOI intersects 2 parcels; ownership and assessed value suppressed per field policy.

observed_value.source_note: Fixture parcel data for Buncombe County mountain/slope stress case. Zoning not available from Buncombe County GIS parcel layer.

evidence.caveat: Fixture-only parcel data for Buncombe County. Parcel boundaries are approximate; not survey-grade. Ownership, easements, and recorded instruments require confirmation by the Buncombe County Register of Deeds and a licensed surveyor. Acreage and classification are indicative only. Zoning is not available from the Buncombe County GIS parcel layer; verify land use with Buncombe County Planning.
